widget.name: EdtsInputColorPicker
widget.description: Color picker input with native swatch, editable hex value, and inline validation.

property.caption: Value Attribute
property.description: Select the string attribute on the current object that stores the color value.

property.caption: Label
property.description: Optional field label shown above the color picker.

property.caption: Placeholder
property.description: Optional placeholder shown in the hex input.

property.caption: Helper Text
property.description: Optional helper text shown below the widget when there is no validation error.

property.caption: Default Color
property.description: Fallback color used when the current value is empty or invalid.

property.caption: Required
property.description: Require a color value before submitting the form.

property.caption: Required Message
property.description: Message shown when no value is provided.

property.defaultValue: Enter a valid hex color like #2563eb.
property.caption: Invalid Color Message
property.description: Message shown when the hex value is not valid.

property.caption: Validate On Change
property.description: Validate while the user is typing.

property.caption: On Change
property.description: Optional action executed after the color value changes.

property.caption: On Blur
property.description: Optional action executed when the widget loses focus.
